# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

Apply Online

**Programme Highlights**

115+ hours of training | 6+ industry projects | Live sessions by IIT Jammu and DIYguru faculty

Hands-on practical training | Real hardware lab access

IIT Jammu campus immersion (3 days)

**Programme Structure / Modules**

Course 1

Electric Vehicle Essentials 1: Industry Ecosystem & Battery Technology

Course 2

Electric Vehicle Essentials 2: Motors, Electrification, and Charging Systems

Course 3

Autodesk Alias Certification Program

Course 4

Certification Course in Motor & Drive System for EVs: Design & Optimization

Course 5

Certification Course in MATLAB-SIMULINK, QSS & ADVISOR Toolbox for EV Design

Course 6

Certification Course in 2W & 4W EV Design & Modeling with SOLIDWORKS

Course 7

ANSYS Certification Course for EVs: Fundamentals to Static Structural Analysis

Course 8

Certification Course in Advanced ANSYS Engineering for Electric Vehicles

**Learning Outcomes**

Analyse the electric vehicle industry ecosystem, regulatory framework, and battery technologies relevant to automotive applications

Understand and evaluate electric motors, power electronics, electrification architecture, and EV charging systems

Develop Class-A automotive surfaces and exterior design concepts using Autodesk Alias

Design and optimise EV motor and drive systems for performance, efficiency, and reliability

Perform EV system modelling and performance analysis using MATLAB-SIMULINK, QSS, and ADVISOR toolboxes

Design and model two-wheeler and four-wheeler EV systems using SOLIDWORKS

Conduct static structural analysis of EV components using ANSYS to evaluate strength and durability

Apply advanced ANSYS techniques for engineering analysis and dynamic evaluation of electric vehicle systems

**Eligibility Criteria**

Bachelor’s degree in Engineering / Technology / Science

Mechanical and Automotive Engineering backgrounds are preferred

Final-year undergraduate students are also eligible to apply

Diploma holders with relevant work experience are eligible

No prior experience in Electric Vehicles or EV design tools is required

**Governing Committee**

A dedicated governing committee composed of IIT Jammu faculty and industry experts ensures that this program meets IIT Jammu’s academic standards and maintains real-world industry relevance.

**Sales & Marketing**

DIYguru has been onboarded as an official partner for online sales, marketing, learner engagement, and digital delivery.

While I3C-IIT Jammu and IIT Jammu provide academic leadership and certification, DIYguru manages admissions, program operations, and support ensuring a seamless learning experience for every learner.

**Admission Process**

Candidates may connect with the DIYguru admission team for guidance on the programme, eligibility, and admission process

Candidates must apply online by submitting the application form through the DIYguru platform

All applications will undergo document and eligibility verification by the DIYguru admissions team in coordination with Institute Incubation and Innovation Council (I3C) - IIT Jammu

Eligible applicants may be required to appear for an online entrance assessment

Based on eligibility and assessment results, shortlisted candidates will receive an Offer Letter issued by I3C–IIT Jammu

Upon acceptance of the offer, candidates must complete the fee payment as per the approved structure

Enrollment will be formally confirmed by I3C–IIT Jammu after verification of payment

The final Admission Letter will be issued by I3C–IIT Jammu, confirming successful admission into the programme delivered in collaboration with DIYguru

Get in Touch

**Contact Details**

For programme-related queries, please contact:

DIYguru Program Support

Email: support@diyguru.org

info@i3c-iitjammu.in

Phone: +91-99109-18719

Website:https://diyguru.org

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

# Program Structure

## Modules:

- AI Foundations for Business Leaders
- Generative AI for Business Transformation
- Transformer Revolution: Decoding LLMs
- Applying AI in Business Functions
- AI Strategy, Roadmapping & ROI
- Leading AI Transformation & Workforce Change
- Capstone project to create an enterprise AI adoption and transformation roadmap

## Program Highlights

- Learn through expert-led sessions delivered by IIT Jammu faculty and leading industry practitioners.
- Gain practical exposure through industry immersion sessions focused on real-world AI applications and business transformation.
- Work on a hands-on capstone project designed to apply Generative AI concepts to strategic business challenges.
- Experience high-quality, application-oriented learning through case studies, live projects, and implementation-focused sessions.
- Receive personalized mentoring, continuous assessments, and academic feedback to support your progress.
- Access all content, recordings, and evaluations through Accredian’s advanced learning platform till the issuance of the Certificate.

## Learning Outcomes

By completing this program, you will:

- Build a strategic understanding of Generative AI and its enterprise applications across industries.
- Leverage enterprise AI tools and platforms to improve productivity and business efficiency.
- Apply advanced prompt engineering techniques for business communication, analysis, research, and decision support.
- Develop AI-powered applications, agents, and enterprise use cases for real-world implementation.
- Identify high-impact AI opportunities across core business functions and evaluate their strategic value.
- Understand key considerations around AI governance, ethics, risk management, and responsible deployment.
- Enhance decision-making through AI-assisted research, content generation, and business intelligence capabilities.
- Build practical implementation capabilities through hands-on projects, industry case studies, and applied learning exercises.
- Develop a comprehensive enterprise AI adoption roadmap focused on scalable business impact and long-term transformation.

## Governing Committee

A dedicated governing committee composed of IIT Jammu faculty and industry experts ensures that this program meets IIT Jammu’s academic standards and maintains real-world industry relevance.

## Eligibility Criteria

- **Academic Background:** Graduates (10+2+3) from a recognized university (UGC/AICTE/DEC/AIU/State Government/recognized international universities) in any discipline are eligible to apply. Diploma holders are also eligible.
- **Preferred Profile:** Working professionals and aspiring leaders looking to build expertise in AI-driven business transformation and innovation.
- **Work Experience:** Preferred experience of 5+ years.
- **Documentation Required:** Graduation Certificate, Experience Certificate, and a Professional Headshot.
- **Language Skills:** The program is delivered in English; learners should have good written and verbal communication skills.

## Ideal For:

- Graduates eager to start a career in AI, data science, or analytics.
- IT professionals looking to transition into AI and machine learning roles.
- Developers and project managers who want to expand their skillset into data-driven decision-making.
- Technology students aim to enhance their academic learning with hands-on AI exposure.

## Sales & Marketing

- Accredian has been onboarded as I3C-IIT Jammu’s official partner for online sales, marketing, learner engagement, and digital delivery.
- While I3C-IIT Jammu and IIT Jammu provide academic leadership and certification, Accredian manages outreach, admissions, and program operations, ensuring a seamless learning experience for every participant.

## Admission Process

- Candidates are advised to connect with an Accredian Learning Consultant for detailed guidance on the program, eligibility, and admission process.
- Candidates must apply online by submitting the application form through the Accredian platform.
- All applications will undergo document and eligibility verification by the Accredian admissions team in coordination with I3C–IIT Jammu.
- Eligible applicants will be invited to appear for an online entrance assessment.
- The assessment will evaluate the candidate’s general aptitude, including basic reasoning and analytical skills.
- Based on the assessment results and eligibility, shortlisted candidates will receive an Offer Letter issued by I3C–IIT Jammu.
- Upon acceptance of the offer, candidates must complete the fee payment as per the approved structure.
- The final Admission Letter will be issued post full fee payment, confirming successful admission into the program delivered in collaboration with Accredian.

## Contact Details

- For program or admission-related queries, please contact:
- admissions@accredian.com
- info@i3c-iitjammu.in

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

# Program Structure

## Modules:

- Foundations of Generative AI and Agentic AI
- Generative AI Tools, Prompting and Workflows
- Generative AI Applications Across Business Functions
- Generative AI Strategy, Roadmapping and ROI
- Building Generative AI Products and Services
- Capstone project to identify a real business problem and design a Generative AI–powered solution.

## Program Highlights

- Earn a certification from IIT Jammu upon successful completion of the program.
- Learn through expert-led sessions delivered by IIT Jammu faculty and leading industry practitioners.
- Gain practical exposure through industry immersion sessions focused on real-world AI applications and business transformation.
- Work on a hands-on capstone project designed to apply Generative AI concepts to strategic business challenges.
- Experience high-quality, application-oriented learning through case studies, live projects, and implementation-focused sessions.
- Receive personalized mentoring, continuous assessments, and academic feedback to support your progress.
- Access all content, recordings, and evaluations through Accredian’s advanced learning platform till the issuance of the Certificate.

## Learning Outcomes

By completing this program, you will:

- Develop a strong foundation in Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), and Agentic AI systems.
- Understand the practical working of modern AI systems, including prompting, reasoning, retrieval, and autonomous AI workflows.
- Leverage enterprise GenAI tools and platforms to improve productivity and business efficiency.
- Understand Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks and enterprise knowledge systems for AI-enabled decision support.
- Evaluate Generative AI applications across key business functions including marketing, operations, HR, finance, strategy, and customer experience.
- Assess the business impact, scalability, and ROI of enterprise AI adoption initiatives.
- Develop strategic AI roadmaps aligned with organizational goals, digital transformation priorities, and innovation objectives.
- Understand the economic and operational considerations involved in deploying Generative AI at scale.
- Build practical implementation capabilities through hands-on projects, industry case studies, and applied learning exercises.
- Design a capstone solution that identifies a real business challenge and develops a Generative AI–powered implementation strategy.

## Governing Committee

A dedicated governing committee composed of IIT Jammu faculty and industry experts ensures that this program meets IIT Jammu’s academic standards and maintains real-world industry relevance.

## Eligibility Criteria

- **Academic Background:** Graduates (10+2+3) from a recognized university (UGC/AICTE/DEC/AIU/State Government/recognized international universities) in any discipline are eligible to apply. Diploma holders are also eligible.
- **Preferred Profile:** Working professionals and aspiring leaders looking to build expertise in AI-driven business transformation and innovation.
- **Work Experience:** Preferred experience of 5+ years
- **Documentation Required:** Graduation Certificate, Experience Certificate, and a Professional Headshot.
- **Language Skills:** The program is delivered in English; learners should have good written and verbal communication skills.

## Ideal For:

- Graduates eager to start a career in AI, data science, or analytics.
- IT professionals looking to transition into AI and machine learning roles.
- Developers and project managers who want to expand their skillset into data-driven decision-making.
- Technology students aim to enhance their academic learning with hands-on AI exposure.

## Sales & Marketing

- Accredian has been onboarded as I3C-IIT Jammu’s official partner for online sales, marketing, learner engagement, and digital delivery.
- While I3C-IIT Jammu and IIT Jammu provide academic leadership and certification, Accredian manages outreach, admissions, and program operations, ensuring a seamless learning experience for every participant.

## Admission Process

1. Candidates are advised to connect with an Accredian Learning Consultant for detailed guidance on the program, eligibility, and admission process.
2. Candidates must apply online by submitting the application form through the Accredian platform.
3. All applications will undergo document and eligibility verification by the Accredian admissions team in coordination with I3C–IIT Jammu.
4. Eligible applicants will be invited to appear for an online entrance assessment.
5. The assessment will evaluate the candidate’s general aptitude, including basic reasoning and analytical skills.
6. Based on the assessment results and eligibility, shortlisted candidates will receive an Offer Letter.
7. Upon acceptance of the offer, candidates must complete the fee payment as per the approved structure.
8. The final Admission Letter will be issued post full fee payment, confirming successful admission into the program delivered in collaboration with Accredian.

## Contact Details

For program or admission-related queries, please contact:

- admissions@accredian.com
- info@i3c-iitjammu.in

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

Apply Online

**Programme Highlights**

90+ hours of training | 6+ industry projects | Live sessions by IIT Jammu and DIYguru faculty

Hands-on practical training | Home delivered embedded hardware kit | Real hardware lab access

IIT Jammu campus immersion (3 days)

**Programme Structure / Modules**

Course 1

Electric Vehicle Essentials 1: Industry Ecosystem & Battery Technology

Course 2

Electric Vehicle Essentials 2: Motors, Electrification, and Charging Systems

Course 3

Certification Course in Electronics & Circuit Design for EV Applications

Course 4

Embedded Systems Certification Course: Embedded C, 8051, Arduino & Simulation

Course 5

Certification Course in Embedded Systems Design with STM32 & ARM Cortex-M

Course 6

Certification in Advanced Communication Applications Using ARM Cortex

Course 7

Certification in Advanced Embedded Systems for EVs: ARM Cortex Development & Integration

**Learning Outcomes**

Analyse the electric vehicle industry ecosystem, regulatory framework, and system-level architecture relevant to EV engineering

Understand the fundamentals of electric motors, power electronics, vehicle electrification, and EV charging systems

Design and analyse electronic and power electronic circuits used in EV and automotive applications

Develop embedded systems applications using Embedded C on 8051, Arduino, and simulation platforms

Design embedded systems using STM32 and ARM Cortex-M microcontrollers, including peripheral configuration and debugging

Implement advanced communication protocols such as UART, CAN, and SPI using ARM Cortex-based systems

Develop and integrate ARM Cortex–based embedded systems using the DIYguru Embedded Kit for EV applications, focusing on system integration and real-time operation

**Eligibility Criteria**

Bachelor’s degree in Engineering / Technology / Science

Final-year undergraduate students are also eligible to apply

Diploma holders with a minimum of three years of relevant work experience are eligible

No prior experience in Electric Vehicles or Embedded Systems is required

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

## Certificate Program in Data Science with AI & ML

Apply Online

**Program Structure**

**Modules:**

- Introduction to Data Science
- Artificial Intelligence Foundation
- Mathematical Foundations
- Algorithms and Data Structures
- Introduction to Big Data Technologies
- SQL Fundamentals with Python
- Visualizing Data with Excel Spreadsheets & Cognos Dashboards
- Getting Started with Tableau
- Advanced Data Visualization Techniques in Tableau
- Project 1- Exploratory Data Analysis Project- Social Media Trend Analyzer
- Python For Data Science
- Machine Learning Fundamentals with Python
- Project 2- Predictive Analytics Project - Employee Attrition Prediction
- Deep Learning with TensorFlow
- Project 3- Deep Learning for Image or Text Project- Fake News / Deepfake Detection
- Putting it Together - Data Science for AI Applications
- Capstone Project : AI-Powered Personal Finance Advisor
- Git/DevOps
- Authorization and Managing Identity in Azure
- Managing Storage and Networking

**Program Highlights**

- Earn a prestigious certification from IIT Jammu, with the option of an exclusive campus immersion.
- Learn through Virtual Instructor-Led Training (VILT) with IIT Jammu faculty and SkillUp Online mentors.
- Gain industry-recognized credentials including IBM certifications and micro-credentials from leading tech partners.
- Experience hands-on labs, guided projects, and real-world scenarios designed to strengthen your job readiness.
- Receive personalized mentoring, continuous assessments, and academic feedback to support your progress.
- Access all content, recordings, and evaluations through SkillUp’s advanced learning platform till the issuance of the Certificate.

**Learning Outcomes**

By completing this program, you will:

- Strengthen your foundation in mathematics, statistics, and algorithms for AI and ML.
- Develop advanced Python programming skills for data analysis and AI application development.
- Use Pandas, NumPy, and SciPy to clean, manipulate, and visualize structured and unstructured data.
- Write optimized SQL queries to manage relational databases.
- Build interactive dashboards and visual reports using Tableau and IBM Cognos.
- Design and execute machine learning models with scikit-learn and TensorFlow.
- Apply regression, classification, clustering, and recommendation algorithms to solve business challenges.
- Explore deep learning techniques for computer vision, NLP, and generative AI use cases.
- Work with Azure AI services to deploy cloud-native AI applications.
- Follow ethical AI guidelines and ensure data privacy in your projects.
- Showcase your learning through an industry-oriented capstone project.

**Governing Committee**

A dedicated governing committee composed of IIT Jammu faculty and industry experts ensures that this program meets IIT Jammu’s academic standards and maintains real-world industry relevance.

**Eligibility Criteria**

- Academic Background: Bachelor’s degree in any discipline.
- Preferred Profile: Working professionals and tech-oriented career switchers keen to build a professional base in AI and Data Science.
- Work Experience: Beneficial but not mandatory.
- Language Skills: The program is delivered in English; learners should have good written and verbal communication skills.

**Ideal For:**

- Graduates eager to start a career in AI, data science, or analytics.
- IT professionals looking to transition into AI and machine learning roles.
- Developers and project managers who want to expand their skillset into data-driven decision-making.
- Technology students aim to enhance their academic learning with hands-on AI exposure.

**Sales & Marketing**

SkillUp Online has been onboarded as I3C-IIT Jammu’s partner for online sales, marketing, learner engagement, and digital delivery.

While I3C-IIT Jammu and IIT Jammu provide academic leadership and certification, SkillUp Online manages outreach, admissions, and program operations, ensuring a seamless learning experience for every participant.

**Admission Process**

- Candidates are advised to connect with a SkillUp Learning Consultant for detailed guidance on the program, eligibility, and admission process.
- Candidates must apply online by submitting the application form through the SkillUp platform.
- All applications will undergo document and eligibility verification by the SkillUp admissions team in coordination with I3C–IIT Jammu.
- Eligible applicants will be invited to appear for an online entrance assessment .
- The assessment will evaluate the candidate’s general aptitude, including basic reasoning and analytical skills.
- Based on the assessment results and eligibility, shortlisted candidates will receive an Offer Letter issued by I3C–IIT Jammu.
- Upon acceptance of the offer, candidates must complete the fee payment as per the approved structure on the official I3C-IIT portal.
- Enrollment will be formally confirmed by I3C–IIT Jammu after verification of payment.
- The final Admission Letter will be issued by I3C-IIT Jammu, confirming successful admission into the program delivered in collaboration with SkillUp Online.

**Contact Details**

For program or admission-related queries, please contact:

reachus@skillup.online

info@i3c-iitjammu.in

IIT Jammu offers industry-aligned Certificate Programs designed to help learners build practical skills and gain contemporary knowledge relevant to today’s dynamic professional world. These programs are executed by Institute Incubation and Innovation Council (I3C)-IIT Jammu, the official body responsible for the academic design, coordination, and governance of Certificate Programs at IIT Jammu.

To enhance industry relevance and hands-on learning, EdTech partners are onboarded for program reach, learner support, and to facilitate session delivery. The overall curriculum framework, delivery standards, assessments, and certification remain under the purview of IIT Jammu, ensuring academic rigor and institutional credibility.

For queries, please reach out at info@i3c-iitjammu.in

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

# Program Structure

## Modules:

- Foundations of Generative AI and Agentic AI
- Generative AI Tools, Prompting and Workflows
- Generative AI Applications Across Business Functions
- Generative AI Strategy, Roadmapping and ROI
- Building Generative AI Products and Services
- Capstone project to identify a real business problem and design a Generative AI–powered solution.
- AI Agents and Workflow Automation
- Agentic AI and Autonomous Business Systems
- Leading AI Transformation, Change & Culture
- Responsible AI, Governance, Risk and Trust
- Capstone Project: Develop a comprehensive AI transformation blueprint for your organization
- AI Incubation Challenge

## Program Highlights

- Earn a certification from IIT Jammu upon successful completion of the program.
- Participate in an optional 3-day campus immersion at IIT Jammu for academic engagement and peer networking.
- Learn through expert-led sessions delivered by IIT Jammu faculty and leading industry practitioners.
- Gain practical exposure through industry immersion sessions focused on real-world AI applications and business transformation.
- Work on two hands-on capstone projects designed to apply Generative AI concepts to strategic business challenges.
- Experience high-quality, application-oriented learning through case studies, live projects, and implementation-focused sessions.
- Receive 6 dedicated career assistance sessions by Accredian to support career growth and professional advancement.
- Receive personalized mentoring, continuous assessments, and academic feedback to support your progress.
- Access all content, recordings, and evaluations through Accredian’s advanced learning platform till the issuance of the Certificate.

## Learning Outcomes

By completing this program, you will:

- Build a strategic understanding of Generative AI, Agentic AI, LLMs, and autonomous business systems.
- Leverage enterprise GenAI tools and platforms to improve productivity and business efficiency.
- AI-enabled workflows and automate business operations using no-code and low-code platforms.
- Design AI-powered workflows, assistants, and enterprise solutions using prompting, RAG frameworks, and workflow automation systems.
- Evaluate Generative AI applications, business impact, ROI, and adoption strategies across core business functions.
- Build AI-powered products, services, and scalable enterprise use cases aligned with organizational objectives.
- Understand responsible AI practices including governance, risk management, ethics, trust, and compliance considerations.
- Lead AI-driven transformation initiatives by aligning technology, strategy, culture, and change management.
- Develop enterprise AI transformation blueprints and solve real-world business challenges through applied capstone projects and AI incubation initiatives.
- Design a capstone solution that identifies a real business challenge and develops a Generative AI–powered implementation strategy.

## Governing Committee

A dedicated governing committee composed of IIT Jammu faculty and industry experts ensures that this program meets IIT Jammu’s academic standards and maintains real-world industry relevance.

## Eligibility Criteria

- **Academic Background:** Graduates (10+2+3) from a recognized university (UGC/AICTE/DEC/AIU/State Government/recognized international universities) in any discipline are eligible to apply. Diploma holders are also eligible.
- **Preferred Profile:** Working professionals and aspiring leaders looking to build expertise in AI-driven business transformation and innovation.
- **Work Experience:** Preferred experience of 5+ years.
- **Documentation Required:** Graduation Certificate, Experience Certificate, and a Professional Headshot.
- **Language Skills:** The program is delivered in English; learners should have good written and verbal communication skills.

## Ideal For:

- Graduates eager to start a career in AI, data science, or analytics.
- IT professionals looking to transition into AI and machine learning roles.
- Developers and project managers who want to expand their skillset into data-driven decision-making.
- Technology students aim to enhance their academic learning with hands-on AI exposure.

## Sales & Marketing

- Accredian has been onboarded as I3C-IIT Jammu’s official partner for online sales, marketing, learner engagement, and digital delivery.

- Candidates are advised to connect with an Accredian Learning Consultant for detailed guidance on the program, eligibility, and admission process.
- Candidates must apply online by submitting the application form through the Accredian platform.
- All applications will undergo document and eligibility verification by the Accredian admissions team in coordination with I3C-IIT Jammu.
- Eligible applicants will be invited to appear for an online entrance assessment.
- The assessment will evaluate the candidate’s general aptitude, including basic reasoning and analytical skills.
- Based on the assessment results and eligibility, shortlisted candidates will receive an Offer Letter.
- Upon acceptance of the offer, candidates must complete the fee payment as per the approved structure.
- The final Admission Letter will be issued post full fee payment, confirming successful admission into the program delivered in collaboration with Accredian.

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

# Program Structure

## Modules:

- AI Foundations for Business Leaders
- Generative AI for Business Transformation
- Applying AI in Business Functions
- AI Strategy, Roadmapping & ROI
- Leading AI Transformation & Workforce Change
- Capstone project: Develop an AI adoption and transformation plan for an organization or industry
- Building AI Products and Services (No-Code AI)
- Responsible AI, Governance and Risk Management
- Agentic AI and Autonomous Business Systems
- Capstone Project: Design a practical AI transformation initiative for your organization or industry.

## Program Highlights

- Earn a prestigious certification from IIT Jammu upon successful completion of the program.
- Participate in an optional 3-day campus immersion at IIT Jammu for academic engagement and peer networking.
- Learn through expert-led sessions delivered by IIT Jammu faculty and leading industry practitioners.
- Gain practical exposure through industry immersion sessions focused on real-world AI applications and business transformation.
- Work on two hands-on capstone projects designed to apply Generative AI concepts to strategic business challenges.
- Experience high-quality, application-oriented learning through case studies, live projects, and implementation-focused sessions.
- Receive 6 dedicated career assistance sessions by Accredian to support career growth and professional advancement.
- Receive personalized mentoring, continuous assessments, and academic feedback to support your progress.
- Access all content, recordings, and evaluations through Accredian’s advanced learning platform till the issuance of the Certificate.

## Learning Outcomes

By completing this program, you will:

- Build a strategic understanding of AI, Generative AI, Agentic AI, and autonomous business systems.
- Leverage AI technologies and data-driven insights to support business decision-making and organizational growth.
- Understand the practical applications of machine learning, transformers, and Large Language Models (LLMs) in enterprise environments.
- Apply AI across key business functions including operations, marketing, finance, HR, strategy, and customer experience.
- Leverage enterprise AI tools and platforms to improve productivity and business efficiency..
- Evaluate AI adoption opportunities, business impact, ROI, and enterprise transformation strategies.
- Design AI-powered products, services, and no-code AI solutions for real-world business applications.
- Lead AI-driven transformation initiatives by aligning technology adoption with workforce, culture, and change management priorities.
- Understand responsible AI practices including governance, ethics, fairness, bias mitigation, risk management, and trust in AI systems.
- Explore emerging technologies such as multi-agent systems, swarm intelligence, quantum AI, blockchain integration, and human–machine collaboration.

A dedicated governing committee composed of IIT Jammu faculty and industry experts ensures that this program meets IIT Jammu’s academic standards and maintains real-world industry relevance.

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

**Program Overview**

This program focuses on **professional designing, building, and deploying agentic AI applications**—AI systems that **act autonomously**, coordinate across tools, and operate reliably in production environments **using AIOps.**

**Duration**: 7 Months

**Contact Hours**: 130

**Applications Built**: 10+ with live URLs

**Campus Immersion**: Optional

**Industry & Admission Partner**: Futurense Technologies

**Program Structure**

**Months 1–2: Agent Foundations & RAG**

**Module 1: Agent Foundations (No-Code First)**

- Agent architectures (ReAct, Plan-Execute)
- Tool calling and memory systems
- Workflow design using n8n
- Build research assistants, email triage agents

**Module 2: Agentic RAG & Intelligent Retrieval**

- Self-RAG and corrective RAG
- Hybrid search and reranking
- Multi-source retrieval design
- Build enterprise knowledge assistants

**Months 3–4: Multi-Agent Systems**

**Module 3: Multi-Agent Orchestration**

- Role-based agent teams
- LangGraph workflows
- Supervisor architectures
- Build content, research, and lead-qualification agents

**Module 4: Advanced Application Patterns**

- Guardrails and validation
- Human-in-the-loop systems
- Escalation and fallback design
- Secure and production-safe agent patterns Month 5: AIOps & Intelligent Automation

**Module 5: AIOps Fundamentals**

- Observability and tracing
- AI-powered log analysis
- Anomaly detection
- Automated incident response systems

**Months 6–7: Deployment & Capstone**

**Module 6: Production Deployment**

- Dockerized agent systems
- CI/CD for AI applications
- Cost tracking and optimization

**Module 7: Capstone Project**

- End-to-end agentic AI system
- Multi-agent + RAG + AIOps
- Live deployment and demo

**Program Highlights**

- Build real-world autonomous AI agents
- Learn no-code → low-code → production pipelines
- Master agent orchestration + AIOps
- Graduate with a live agent portfolio

**Learning Outcomes**

**Learners will be able to:**

- Design and orchestrate multi-agent systems
- Implement agentic RAG pipelines
- Deploy and monitor AI systems at scale
- Apply AIOps for reliability and cost control
- Build enterprise-ready AI applications

**Eligibility Criteria**

- Education: B.Tech / B.E. / BCA / M.Sc. / MCA (50%+)
- Background: Basic programming or application development exposure
- AI Familiarity: Prior experience using AI tools preferred

**Ideal For**

- Engineers and developers
- AI automation professionals
- Product managers with technical exposure
- Professionals building AI-driven workflows

**Sales & Program Delivery**

Academic oversight and certification are provided by I3C–IIT Jammu, while Futurense Technologies manages admissions, delivery, and learner support.

**Admission Process**

1. Online application

2. Pre-screening assessment

3. Application fee payment

4. Industry interview

5. Offer letter issuance

6. Fee payment & enrollment confirmation

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

Apply Online

**Program Overview**

This advanced postgraduate certification takes you from the building blocks of LLM technology; starting from NLP and ML, all the way till how LLMs work under the hood, how to build a mini-version of LLM - an SLM. It incorporates all the prerogatives required as per the industry standard of today - RAGs, vector DB, context engineering. And, the cherry on top is the agentic layer which will make you equipped not just for today, but for the upcoming years of rapidly evolving AI and Agentic AI technologies.

**Duration**: 7 Months (28 Weeks)

**Contact Hours**: 130 Contact Hours

**Projects**: 15+ AI projects with live URLs

**Campus Immersion**: Optional

**Industry & Admission Partner**: Futurense Technologies

**Program Structure**

**Your 7-Month Learning Journey**

**Month 1: NLP & ML Foundations**

**Module 1: NLP & ML Foundations**

- Introduction to NLP & Text Processing
- N-gram & Statistical Language Models
- Text Classification & Logistic Regression
- ML Essentials: Classification & Ensemble Methods
- Word Embeddings & Distributed Representations
- Neural Network Fundamentals & Deep Learning for Text
- Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs), LSTMs & GRUs

**Month 2: Sequence Models & Transformers**

**Module 2: Sequence Models & Transformers**

- Attention Mechanism & Transformer Architecture
- BERT & Masked Language Models
- GPT & Autoregressive Language Models
- Tokenization Deep Dive & Model Internals
- Hands-on: HuggingFace Ecosystem & Transfer Learning

**Month 3: LLMs & Prompt Engineering**

**Module 3: LLMs & Prompt Engineering**

- LLM Landscape & How They Work
- Prompt Engineering Frameworks & Advanced Prompting
- LLM APIs & Integration; Evaluation, Red Teaming & Safety
- No-Code LLM Applications, LangChain Fundamentals & Chains
- Function Calling, Tool Use & Embeddings Deep Dive

**Month 4: RAG Architecture**

**Module 4: RAG Architecture**

- Vector Databases & Indexing
- RAG Pipeline: Naive to Advanced; Advanced RAG Patterns
- RAG Evaluation & Production Patterns
- Context Engineering for RAG; Mini Project: Enterprise RAG System

**Month 5: LLM/SLM Engineering**

**Module 5: LLM/SLM Engineering**

- Fine-tuning Decision Framework; Alignment: RLHF, DPO & Training Objectives
- Hands-on Fine-tuning: Dataset & Setup; Fine-tuning Sprint & Evaluation
- Quantization & Inference Optimization; Model Deployment & Serving
- Agent Evolution & Architecture; Agent Frameworks (CrewAI & LangGraph); Multi-Agent Systems & Orchestration

**Month 6: Agentic AI & Production**

**Module 6: Agentic AI & Production**

- No-Code & Low-Code Agents
- AI Evaluation & Safety; Observability & Production Ops
- Advanced Agentic Workflows
- Production Agentic Application Sprint

**Month 7: Capstone & Portfolio Engineering**

**Module 7: Capstone & Portfolio Engineering**

- Capstone Architecture & Design
- Capstone Development Sprint 1 & Sprint 2
- Portfolio Engineering: Deploy, Document & Present

**Program Highlights**

- Build custom SLMs published on HuggingFace
- Design and deploy multi-domain RAG systems
- Gain hands-on experience with enterprise-grade AI stacks
- Learn production deployment, monitoring, and optimization
- Earn an IIT Jammu PG Certificate via I3C
- Career Assistance by Futurense

**Learning Outcomes**

By completing this program, learners will:

- Understand transformer architectures and LLM internals
- Fine-tune and deploy Small Language Models
- Design scalable RAG and context-engineering systems
- Build production-ready LLM APIs with monitoring
- Apply AI safely using evaluation and governance practices
- Showcase a multi-project AI portfolio

**Eligibility Criteria**

- Education: B.Tech / B.E. / M.Sc. / MCA (50%+ aggregate)
- Technical Skills: Python proficiency required
- AI Familiarity: Prior use of AI tools preferred

**Ideal For**

- Final-year engineering students
- Early-career AI/ML professionals
- Mid-career professionals transitioning into GenAI
- Developers and engineers building AI products

**Sales & Program Delivery**

While I3C-IIT Jammu provides academic governance and certification, Futurense Technologies manages admissions, learner engagement, program delivery, and industry alignment.

**Admission Process**

2. Complete pre-screening assessment
3. Pay application fee
4. Receive Offer Letter
5. Complete fee payment

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

Apply Online

**Programme Highlights**

A comprehensive programme covering foundational and advanced concepts in automotive design and CAE.

- **175+ hours of structured learning | 35+ industry-grade automotive projects | 125+ practical challenges**
- **Learn from experienced industry professionals and IIT Jammu–led faculty** through a structured academic delivery model.
- **Hands-on training using industry-standard automotive design and CAE tools**, aligned with real-world engineering workflows.
- **Self-paced learning supported by recorded modules and live interactive sessions,** enabling flexibility without compromising academic rigor.
- **Career readiness and placement assistance facilitated by Skill-Lync**, subject to eligibility and programme norms.

**Programme Structure / Modules**

**Design Track – Mandatory Courses**

**Course 1**

Automotive Plastic Design using CATIA V5

**Course 2**

Automotive Sheet Metal Design using Siemens NX CAD / CATIA V5

**Course 3**

Automotive BIW Fixture Design using CATIA V5

**Course 4**

Geometric Dimensioning and Tolerancing (GD&T)

**Course 5**

Automotive Wiring Harness Design using CATIA V5

**CAE Track – Mandatory Courses**

**Course 6**

Preprocessor for Structural Analysis using ANSA

**Course 7**

LS-DYNA for Structural Mechanics / Finite Element Analysis

**Optional Courses**

**Course 8**

Tolerance Stack-Up Analysis

**Course 9**

Benchmarking and Costing for Automotive Product Development

**Course 10**

Automotive Class-A Surfacing using ALIAS

**Course 11**

Engineering Basics with DFM & DFA

**Course 12**

Sheet Metal and Welding Processes

**Course 13**

Crashworthiness Analysis using HyperMesh and Radioss

**Learning Outcomes**

Upon successful completion of the programme, participants will be able to:

- Understand automotive product development cycles, vehicle architecture, and OEM engineering workflows.
- Design automotive plastic, sheet metal, BIW, and wiring harness components in compliance with manufacturability, safety, and industry standards.
- Apply Geometric Dimensioning and Tolerancing (GD&T) principles as per ASME standards to interpret and create functional engineering drawings.
- Develop proficiency in industry-standard automotive design and CAE tools including CATIA V5, Siemens NX, ANSA, LS-DYNA, HyperMesh, and ALIAS.
- Prepare simulation-ready finite element models through geometry clean-up, meshing, and pre-processing workflows.
- Set up, execute, and interpret structural and crashworthiness simulations for automotive components and systems.
- Perform tolerance analysis, benchmarking, and cost estimation to support engineering decision-making.
- Apply engineering fundamentals, DFM and DFA principles to optimise designs for manufacturing and assembly.
- Execute real-world automotive design and analysis projects aligned with OEM and Tier-1 industry requirements.

**Eligibility Criteria**

Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, Automobile Engineering, or allied engineering disciplines.

Final-year undergraduate students and fresh graduates are eligible to apply.

Working professionals with relevant industry experience may also apply.

No prior experience with automotive design or CAE tools is required.

**Admission Process**

- Candidates may connect with the Skill-Lync admission team for guidance on the programme, eligibility, and admission process.
- Candidates must apply online by submitting the application form through the Skill-Lync platform.
- All applications will undergo document and eligibility verification by the Skill-Lync admissions team in coordination with I3C (Institute Incubation and Innovation Council) – Indian Institute of Technology Jammu.
- Selection of candidates will be carried out based on academic credentials and relevant experience.
- The list of selected candidates will be shared by I3C–IIT Jammu with Skill-Lync, and a confirmation email will be sent to the selected candidates by I3C–IIT Jammu.
- Offer letters for selected candidates will be issued by Skill-Lync through email, with copies marked to I3C-IIT Jammu.
- The programme fee will be collected directly by I3C–IIT Jammu from the candidates after the offer letter has been issued.
- Upon receipt of payment as per the approved terms, the enrolment letter containing programme details will be issued to the candidate by I3C–IIT Jammu, confirming successful admission.

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

**Programme Highlights**

Master Electric Vehicle technology from fundamentals to advanced simulations, with optional specialization in Autonomous Vehicles.

- **300+ hours of structured learning | 25+ industry-grade automotive projects | 135+ practical challenges**
- **Learn from experienced industry professionals and IIT Jammu–led faculty** through a structured academic delivery model.
- Hands-on training using industry-standard EV engineering tools, aligned with real-world electric powertrain, battery systems, and vehicle integration workflows.
- **Self-paced learning supported by recorded modules and live interactive sessions**, enabling flexibility without compromising academic rigor.
- **Career readiness and placement assistance facilitated by Skill-Lync**, subject to eligibility and programme norms.

**Programme Structure / Modules**

**EV Core – Mandatory Courses**

**Course 1**

EV Fundamentals

**Course 2**

Matlab and Simulink Basics

**Course 3**

Design Concepts of Power Electronic Converters

**Course 4**

Fuel Cell and Ultra Capacitor for EV

**Course 5**

Li-ion Battery System Design in EV & ES

**Course 6**

PCB Design for Beginners using Altium Designer

**Course 7**

Electric Motor Design using MATLAB and ANSYS Maxwell

**Optional Courses**

**EV Electives**

**Course 1**

EV Technology Series

**Course 2**

Basics of Electric Vehicle Simulations using Ansys

**Course 3**

Hybrid Electric Vehicle Simulation Using GT-SUITE

**Course 4**

Automotive Wiring Harness using CATIA V5

**Optional Self-Paced Track**

**Autonomous**

**Course 1**

Core and Advanced Python Programming

**Course 2**

Data Structures and Algorithms using Python

**Course 3**

Introduction to ADAS & Vehicle Validation

**Course 4**

Computer Vision for Autonomous Vehicles

**Course 5**

Localization, Mapping, and SLAM

**Course 6**

Path Planning and Trajectory Optimization

**Course 7**

Autonomous Vehicle Controls

**Learning Outcomes**

Upon successful completion of the programme, participants will be able to:

- Understand electric vehicle architectures, powertrain layouts, and system-level interactions across EV and hybrid vehicle platforms.
- Analyze and design key EV subsystems including battery packs, electric motors, power electronic converters, and energy storage systems using industry-aligned methodologies.
- Apply EV engineering fundamentals to model, simulate, and evaluate performance, efficiency, thermal behavior, and energy flow under real-world driving conditions.
- Develop proficiency in industry-standard EV engineering and simulation tools such as MATLAB, Simulink, ANSYS, GT-SUITE, CATIA V5, and Altium Designer.
- Build simulation-ready EV subsystem models including battery systems, motors, inverters, and powertrains through structured modeling and validation workflows.
- Design and analyze lithium-ion battery systems considering performance, safety, thermal management, and real-world integration constraints.
- Model, simulate, and evaluate electric and hybrid vehicle behavior using system-level tools to assess drivability, efficiency, and energy management strategies.
- Execute hands-on EV engineering projects covering power electronics, motor design, battery modeling, vehicle simulations, and wiring harness design aligned with OEM and Tier-1 practices.
- Apply model-based development, simulation-driven decision-making, and validation techniques used in real EV and autonomous vehicle engineering workflows.

**Eligibility Criteria**

Bachelor’s degree (minimum 3 years) in Electrical, Electronics, Mechanical, Automobile, Aerospace Engineering, or allied engineering disciplines.

Final-year undergraduate students and fresh graduates are eligible to apply.

Working professionals with up to 2 years of relevant experience in EV, electrical, electronics, or automotive engineering roles may also apply.

Diploma holders with a minimum of 2 years of relevant EV or automotive engineering experience are eligible.

Applicants must have secured a minimum of 50% in their qualifying degree.

No prior experience with EV-specific tools or simulation software is required.

**Admission Process**

- Candidates may connect with the Skill-Lync admission team for guidance on the programme, eligibility, and admission process.
- Candidates must apply online by submitting the application form through the Skill-Lync platform.
- All applications will undergo document and eligibility verification by the Skill-Lync admissions team in coordination with I3C (Institute Incubation and Innovation Council) – Indian Institute of Technology Jammu.
- Selection of candidates will be carried out based on academic credentials and relevant experience.
- The list of selected candidates will be shared by I3C–IIT Jammu with Skill-Lync, and a confirmation email will be sent to the selected candidates by I3C–IIT Jammu.
- Offer letters for selected candidates will be issued by I3C–IIT Jammu through email, with copies marked to Skill-Lync.
- The programme fee will be collected directly by I3C–IIT Jammu from the candidates after the offer letter has been issued.
- Upon receipt of payment as per the approved terms, the enrolment letter containing programme details will be issued to the candidate by I3C–IIT Jammu, confirming successful admission.

# Page Title: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu | Leading Engineering Institute for Future Innovators

**Programme Structure:**

**Modules:**

- Introduction to Generative AI in Marketing
- Prompt Engineering for Marketers
- AI-Generated Content for Campaigns
- AI in Visual and Video Content Creation
- Personalization & Customer Journey Mapping
- Search Engine Optimization with Gen AI
- Social media & Influencer Strategy with AI
- AI for Marketing Analytics and Campaign Optimization
- Ethical Use of Gen AI in Marketing
- Integrated AI Marketing Stack & Automation
- Project

**Programme Highlights:**

- Opportunity to gain a “Certificate of Completion/Participation” from IIT Jammu.

**Certificate of Completion**: A Certificate of Completion will be issued to the participant who will fulfil all criteria (Attendance & Evaluation) related to completion of course.
- Course content and structure designed entirely by I3C and IIT Jammu.
- Lectures delivered by the eminent faculty from IIT Jammu and PW Experts.

**Learning Outcomes:**

Upon successful completion of the Professional Certificate Programme in Generative AI in Digital Marketing, participants will be able to:

- **Understand the Landscape**

Grasp the core concepts, capabilities, and limitations of Generative AI and its growing role in the digital marketing ecosystem.
- **Generate Marketing Content Using AI**

Create engaging and brand-aligned marketing copy, product descriptions, ad creatives, blog posts, and social media content using Gen AI tools.
- **Enhance Customer Targeting & Personalization**

Use AI to segment audiences, predict customer behavior, and personalize communication at scale for higher engagement and ROI.
- **Leverage Data-Driven Insights**

Analyze marketing metrics, customer journeys, and campaign effectiveness using AI-powered analytics and dashboards.
- **Master Prompt Engineering**

Apply effective prompt design techniques to get optimal outputs from tools like ChatGPT, DALL·E, Copy.ai, Jasper, and Midjourney.
- **Integrate AI Tools into Marketing Tech Stack**

Seamlessly incorporate Gen AI platforms with CRM, email automation, performance marketing, and content management systems.
- **Optimize Campaigns Using AI**

Perform AI-assisted A/B testing, performance forecasting, and campaign iteration based on real-time feedback and AI-generated recommendations.
- **Apply Ethical & Responsible AI Marketing Practices**

Understand data privacy, brand consistency, content authenticity, and ethical use of AI in consumer-facing campaigns.
- **Deliver a Marketing Project**

Design and present a fully AI-powered, cross-channel digital marketing campaign that solves a real-world business challenge.

**Governing Committee:**

A governing committee consisting of in-house faculty and renowned industry experts has been constituted to ensure compliance of the course with IIT Jammu academic standards.

**Eligibility Criteria:**

Professionals who are interested in building a career in analytics. This Programme would demand adequate familiarity with high-school level mathematics.

- Graduates (10+2+3) or Diploma Holders (only 10+2+3) from a recognized university in any stream from any recognized University or Institution
- Students pursuing graduation are also eligible
- Diploma Holders with at least **1 year** of work experience
- 10+2/HSC Participants with at least **1 year**of work experience

- Offer letters for selected candidates will be sent by I3C-IIT Jammu through email with copies to PhysicsWallah (PW).
- The balance fee will be collected directly by I3C–IIT Jammu from the candidate after the offer letter has been issued.
- Once payment as per terms has been received by I3C-IIT Jammu, the enrolment letter containing all the details will be sent to the candidate by I3C-IIT Jammu.
